arts.ttl: Player ‘has agreement’ to join Manchester United – Amorim decision big hint arrival is imminent
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu already ‘has an agreement’ to join Manchester United, and that may now be on the cards as Antony departs for Real Betis. That’s according to Corriere dello Sport and Diario de Sevilla, who both provide positive takes on the situation today. arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea or Man Utd? Benjamin Sesko has already picked his next club
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko is one of the most eligible players on the transfer market, but the Slovenia international already knows what club he wants to play for when he leaves the Bundesliga side. “Last summer when the project was pitched from Arsenal, Chelsea and Man United, Sesko picked Arsenal and then made a secondary choice of whether it was now or to stay at Leipzig,” football transfer news expert Ben Jacobs told Inside Gooners.

arts.ttl: Tyrell Malacia wants to be at Manchester United to be tested against the best
arts.sum: Malacia has been limited to six first-team appearances this season following a long-standing knee injury that cost him all of last season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim frustrated by Man Utd's lack of transfer business
arts.sum: Man Utd head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly frustrated by the club's lack of transfer business.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe finally responds to Ruben Amorim’s ‘worst Man Utd team’ comment
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim slammed his Manchester United squad earlier this month just a short time into his Old Trafford stint and Sir Jim Ratclife has now shared his thoughts on the Portuguese coach’s comments

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Barcelona demand made clear as Man United star eyes 'dream' transfer
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news with an update on Marcus Rashford's uncertain future

arts.ttl: Front page news as Manchester United player ready for ‘gesture’ to make transfer happen
arts.sum: Barcelona have an opportunity to sign Manchester United’s Marcus Rashford in the winter market. Last week, Sport reported the forward prefers a move to the Blaugrana over all other destinations, but Barcelona’s financial situation is making things difficult. arts.ttl: England star makes decision about moving ‘HOME’ to Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United want to bring England international midfielder Angel Gomes back to the club after he departed Old Trafford for Lille as a free agent in 2020. Gomes has decided that he would prefer to hook up with Tottenham than move to Ruben Amorim’s United or indeed Graham Potter’s West Ham, another club that has expressed an interest in him, GiveMeSport reports.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs. Man United: Ruben Amorim could already suffer worst-ever season when Red Devils head to Craven Cottage
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim will aim to avoid his worst-ever season when the Red Devils head to Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday night.

arts.ttl: Sources: What Manchester United now have planned after latest Patrick Dorgu bid rejected
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm what Manchester United are now doing with regards to January target Patrick Dorgu. Man United have been confident over doing...
